div1.entryFree: Tributary, adj. paying tribute, subject; or paid in tribute: that face . . . to which Love's eyes pay t. gazes, Ven. 632. whereat each t. subject quakes, Ven. 632 at this tomb my t. tears I render, Tit. I, 159. III, 1, 270. your t. drops belong to woe, Rom. III, 2, 103. poor t. rivers, Cymb. IV, 2, 36.
